title: Multiplayer Pending
description: Adds a lot of QOL features for the Multiplayer servers as well as optimization mods to run smoothly. Free. Forever.
body:
**Multiplayer Pending** is a comprehensive mod pack for the latest Minecraft versions, designed to elevate your multiplayer experience with a bunch of quality-of-life features and optimizations. Whether you're playing a large server or just playing with friends, Multiplayer Pending enhances gameplay while ensuring smooth performance on low-end hardware. It is simply far superior to vanilla gameplay.

- **Key Features:**

> Backwards Compatible - With help of ViaFabric you can still play on older versions! Just download the latest mc version of the mod pack.

Optimized for Performance: Gain ~**300% more FPS** compared to vanilla mc, And even ~**110% more** than popular optimization mod packs. _(can differ on different hardware)_

Vanilla:

![Vanilla (~260 fps)](https://i.postimg.cc/cHCpYy2N/Vanilla.png)
Fabulously Optimized V6.5.0.B4:

![Fabulously Optimized (~710 FPS)](https://i.postimg.cc/QMB8GykS/FabOpt.png)
Multiplayer Pending V1.1:

![Multiplayer Pending (~770 fps)](https://i.postimg.cc/1zyhmYQD/Multiplayer-Pending.png)

In-Game Customizations: **Change skins**, **switch accounts**, and **browse shaders or texture packs directly in-game** without needing to restart.

Huge QOL: Navigate through many resource packs and servers with ease with help of **Folders**; Use **Mouse tweaks** to quickly manage resources; Use **Auto Drop** for intense mining; **Better server picker**; **More render distance** on servers; **Better server tab menu**; new **Beautiful scoreboard** and **much more!** Making your multiplayer sessions smoother and more enjoyable.

Enhanced Communication: Enjoy a **better chat system with longer history**, **player heads in chat**, **copy a chat message as text or even an image** and **emojis to express your true self**.

Simple Beauty: Enjoy **Amazing players and mobs animations**, **Fixed Z-Overlapping**, **Lovely particles** and **Gorgeous pre-picked Textures and Shaders** for you to choose from.
\
\

Join our discord for support!
